If you are referring to "Maytenus macrostachya" then I can provide some information about the Maytenus genus.

The Maytenus genus consists of flowering plants that are native to South America, and they are also known as Mayten or Maypea. The plants in this genus are known for their potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Maytenus plants include triterpenoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for their therapeutic effects. The most common herbal preparations made from Maytenus plants include tea, tinctures, and capsules, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, pain, and inflammation.
